goal: Synchronize the active documentation to the new game title '思筹之录' and add a PPT outline for the current game progress and presentation needs.
constraints: Only touch active documentation and the PPT outline; do not modify runtime code, image assets, or archive/history docs unless explicitly required.
Preserve existing gameplay facts and unresolved items; use UNKNOWN for anything not yet confirmed.
Do not rewrite story history or old archived materials that intentionally preserve the former project name.
deliverables: Updated active docs that reflect the new game title/subtitle where appropriate
A new PPT outline document under docs/project/
Optional knowledge updates if a durable naming convention change is recorded
